_comment: Community seed notes: plain-English explanations for files/folders commonly found on Macs. Keyed by lowercased basename. Your own annotations (storagesaver annotate) live in ~/.config/storagesaver/notes-cache.json and override these.

notes.data: Contains system and user data on your Mac.
notes.users: Holds personal files for all users of the Mac.
notes.chrome: Stores settings, cache, and other data for Google Chrome browser.
notes.default: Contains default profile data for Google Chrome.
notes.service worker: Manages background tasks for web apps in Chrome.
notes.cachestorage: Holds cached resources for offline use by web apps.
notes.indexeddb: Stores structured data for web applications in Chrome.
notes.webstorage: Saves local storage and session storage data for websites.
notes.indexeddb.blob: Stores binary large objects used by IndexedDB.
notes.file system: Holds Chrome's local file system data for web apps.
notes.profile 9: Data folder for a secondary Chrome profile named Profile 9.
notes.profile 3: Data folder for another Chrome profile named Profile 3.
notes.component_crx_cache: Cache for Chrome extensions and components.
notes.screen_ai: Support files for Google's screen AI feature in Chrome.
notes.drivefs: Files related to Google Drive synchronization on Mac.
notes.androidstudio2021.3: Settings and data for Android Studio version 2021.3.
notes.plugins: Folder containing plugins installed in Android Studio.
notes.github-copilot-intellij: GitHub Copilot plugin folder for Android Studio.
notes.copilot-agent: Copilot agent files used by GitHub Copilot in Android Studio.
notes.bin: Binary files for the Copilot agent, enabling its functionality.
notes.androidstudio2022.1: Contains settings and data for Android Studio IDE.
notes.steam.appbundle: Is the main directory for Steam application support files.
notes.steam: Holds user-specific data and configurations for Steam.
notes.chromium embedded framework.framework: Supports web content rendering in Steam.
notes.versions: Manages different versions of Chromium Embedded Framework.
notes.package: Includes bundled resources needed by Steam application.
notes.config: Stores configuration files and settings used by Steam.
notes.htmlcache: Caches HTML data to speed up web content loading in Steam.
notes.cache_data: Holds cached data to improve performance of web content.
notes.code: Contains user-specific data and extensions for Visual Studio Code.
notes.cachedextensionvsixs: Stores downloaded VS Code extension packages.
notes.ms-dotnettools.csharp-2.140.9-darwin-arm: Is a cached Visual Studio Code extension for C#.
notes.spotify: Contains user data and settings for the Spotify music player app.
notes.persistentcache: Holds cached data to improve Spotify's performance.
notes.update: Stores files used by Spotify during software updates.
notes.temp: Is a temporary directory for storing update files before installation.
notes.spotify.app: Is a copy of the Spotify application being prepared for an update.
notes.primary.ldb: Is a database lock file used by Spotify to manage its cache.
notes.claude: Holds configuration and data files for Claude, likely an AI assistant or tool.
notes.claude-code-vm: Stores virtual machine settings or code related to Claude's functionality.
notes.claude-code: Contains source code or scripts used by the Claude application.
notes.model_file.pth: Model file for Glow-TTS text-to-speech system.
notes.firefox: Folder containing Firefox browser settings and data.
notes.profiles: Directory holding different user profiles for Firefox.
notes.updates: Folder storing Plex updates and installation packages.
notes.packages: Contains package files needed for updating Plex.
notes.cron-updater: Cache folder used by cron-updater tool for scheduled tasks.
notes.pending: Updates or tasks managed by the cron-updater.
notes.notion calendar-darwin-arm64-1.133.0.zip: Notion Calendar update file for Mac.
notes.notion-arm64-4.17.0.zip: Notion app update file for Mac.
notes.wheel: Directory within virtualenv, used for packaging.
notes.epicgameslauncher: Epic Games Launcher specific application data.
notes.ems: Folder inside Epic Games Launcher data.
notes.metadata: Storage for system indexing and search.
notes.spotlightknowledgeevents: Contains data for macOS Spotlight search functionality.
notes.index.v2: Is a versioned index directory used by Spotlight to store metadata.
notes.events: Holds event logs related to user interactions and system changes.
notes.cs_pc_c: Contains compressed serialized property lists for Spotlight events.
notes.cs_priority: Contains priority data for Spotlight events and orders.
notes.embedding_cache: Holds cached embeddings used by Spotlight for search relevance.
notes..embedding_store.db: Stores embedding data for Spotlight indexing.
notes.embedding_store.db: Is another database file for storing embeddings in Spotlight.
notes.spotlightknowledge: Contains knowledge data used by Spotlight for search functionality.
notes.kg: Holds knowledge graph data, essential for Spotlight's understanding and searching capabilities.
notes.nsfileprotectioncompleteuntilfirstuserau: Protects files until the first user logs in.
notes.index.spotlightv3: Is a version 3 index file used by Spotlight for efficient searching.
notes.attachments: Folder contains files sent or received in Messages.
notes.chat.db: Is the database storing all your iMessage conversations and data.
notes.sync: Folder holds synchronization data for Messages app.
notes.sync.db: Is a database file used by Messages to sync across devices.
notes.com.apple.mobilesms: Handles SMS and iMessage functionalities on your Mac.
notes.temporaryitems: Holds temporary files used by the Messages app.
notes.media: Folder contains media files sent or received via Messages.
notes.com.apple.mediaanalysisd: Analyzes media content for macOS features.
notes.com.apple.e5rt.e5bundlecache: Caches bundle data for media analysis.
notes.vms: Directory holding virtual machines used by Docker.
notes.docker.raw: Disk image file for the Docker virtual machine.
notes.vm: Log files related to Docker's virtual machine operations.
notes.com.apple.geod: Data container for Apple's geolocation services.
notes.com.apple.screensaver.engine.legacyscree: Legacy screen saver engine data container.
notes.webkit: Cache storage for web content used by screen savers.
notes.networkcache: Network cache folder for web resources in screen savers.
notes.records: Stored records of cached web resources for screen savers.
notes.org.p0deje.maccy: Data container for Maccy, a clipboard manager app.
notes.maccy: Contains data for Maccy, a clipboard manager app.
notes.storage.sqlite: Maccy's database file storing copied items.
notes.com.mimestream.mimestream: Directory for Mimestream, an email client app.
notes.mimestream: Application support files for the Mimestream app.
notes.group.com.apple.replicatord: Data related to Apple's replication services.
notes.replicatord: Specific folder for Apple's replicatord service data.
notes.group.com.apple.voicememos.shared: Shared group container for Voice Memos recordings.
notes.recordings: Folder holding actual audio recordings from Voice Memos.
notes..cloudrecordings_support: Support files for cloud-synced Voice Memo recordings.
notes.2bua8c4s2c.com.1password: Data folder for 1Password password manager app.
notes.group.com.apple.chronod: Chronod data container for Apple's time synchronization service.
notes.photos: IOS Photos library on Mac, storing photo and video metadata.
notes.libraries: Folder with specific libraries used by the iOS Photos app.
notes.syndication.photoslibrary: Specific photo library file managed by iOS Photos on Mac.
notes.scopes: Contains photo library data for syndication.
notes.syndication: Holds original and derived photos for sharing.
notes.masters: Keeps master copies of edited photos.
notes.database: Stores metadata and information about photos.
notes.photos.sqlite: Specific file holding photo library database.
notes.thumbs: Contains thumbnail images for quick viewing.
notes.android: Data related to Android apps or devices.
notes.sdk: Contains Android development tools and libraries.
notes.build-tools: Includes command-line utilities for building Android apps.
notes.cmdline-tools: Holds command-line tools for Android SDK management.
notes.latest: Most recent version of Android command-line tools.
notes.lib: Libraries used by Android command-line tools.
notes.external: External dependencies for Android command-line tools.
notes.platforms: Android platform files for different API levels.
notes.android-30: Files specific to Android API level 30.
notes.java: Directory for Java development tools and environments.
notes.azul-13.0.13: Azul Systems' Java Development Kit version 13.0.13.
notes.home: Core files of Azul's JDK installation.
notes.corretto-1.8.0_362: Is a Java Virtual Machine for running Java applications.
notes.jre: Contains the Java Runtime Environment needed to execute Java programs.
notes.developer: Folder holds tools and resources for software development.
notes.xcode: Is Apple's integrated development environment for macOS app development.
notes.modulecache.noindex: Caches compiled modules to speed up Xcode builds.
notes.daemon containers: Manages background processes or services on your Mac.
notes.placeholders-v6.noindex: Stores placeholder data used by system daemons.
notes.google: App data — mostly Chrome profile data (bookmarks, extensions, service worker storage)
notes.intelligenceplatform: Contains data for Apple's Intelligence Platform.
notes.artifacts: Holds artifacts used by the Intelligence Platform.
notes.httpstorages: Stores HTTP storage data for various applications.
notes..local: Directory for local user-specific configurations and data.
notes.share: Shared resources for applications, including virtual environments.
notes.python3.11: Python 3.11 libraries inside a virtual environment or tool install.
notes.torch: PyTorch machine-learning library files — re-download with pip when needed.
notes.libtorch_cpu.dylib: Dynamic link library for CPU operations in PyTorch.
notes.llvmlite: LLVM-based library for optimizing Python code performance.
notes.binding: Directory for LLVMLite, enabling LLVM integration with Python.
notes.libllvmlite.dylib: Dynamic link library for LLVMLite, facilitating LLVM functionality.
notes.sympy: Is a library for symbolic mathematics in Python.
notes.scipy: Is a library for scientific and technical computing in Python.
notes.python3.12: Is the Python 3.12 interpreter within a virtual environment.
notes.cmake: Is a build system generator used in software development.

notes.playwright: Is a tool for automating web browsers in Python.
notes.driver: Contains browser drivers used by Playwright.

notes.nuget: Stores packages and caches for .NET projects.
notes.http-cache: Holds cached data from NuGet package sources.
notes.cvt: Contains converted versions of images in the Photos library.
notes.search: Includes search-related data and indexes for Photos.
notes.spotlight: Stores Spotlight indexing information for quick searches.
notes.journals: Logs changes to Spotlight index for efficient updates.
notes.mediaanalysis: Contains metadata and analysis results from media files.
notes.mediaanalysis.sqlite: Contains media analysis data for Apple Photos.
notes.com.apple.photoanalysisd: Directory for photo analysis data used by Apple Photos.
notes.graph: Cache directory storing graph data for photo analysis.
notes.internal: Files for the Photos Library, including metadata.
notes.photosmessagesbackdropdescriptors: Descriptors for photos used as backdrops in messages.
notes.cloudsharing: Data related to cloud sharing features in Photos Library.

notes.code cache: Stores cached JavaScript code to speed up page loading.
notes.js: Holds compiled JavaScript files used by the browser.
notes.dockerdesktopupdates: Includes update files for Docker Desktop application.
